medical_history.chief_complaint: Chronic kidney disease, bilateral optic nerve colobomas and an exceptional PAX-2 gene mutation
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Diagnosed in prenatal scans with bilateral renal hypoplasia, she presented clinical and laboratory findings of chronic kidney disease at 5 days of life. Following tests showed grade II bilateral vesicoureteral reflux spontaneously solved, maintained non nephrotic proteinuria controlled with enalapril and bilateral colobomas with left macular atrophy. Renal function remained stable.
medical_history.past_medical_history: Chronic kidney disease, bilateral renal hypoplasia, grade II bilateral vesicoureteral reflux, proteinuria, bilateral colobomas with left macular atrophy, obesity.

physical_examination.specialty_examination: Bilateral optic nerve colobomas with left macular atrophy, strabismus divergente and ambliopía profunda in the left eye.

laboratory_examinations.changes_over_time: Fluctuated over time, with 0.93 at 5 years and 0 at 9 and 12 years
Increased to 142 at 5 years, then decreased to 37.1 by 12 years

laboratory_examinations.findings: Mutation p.R104X in heterozygosis and variant N21+10G>C (SNP ID: rs4472867)

radiographic_examinations.findings: Bilateral decrease in kidney size, slight increase in parenchymal echogenicity, good corticomedullary differentiation, normal ureters and bladder
radiographic_examinations.changes_over_time: Kidneys grew around the 3rd percentile with progressive increase in parenchymal echogenicity

radiographic_examinations.findings: Apical muscular ventricular septal defect (VSD) without hemodynamic repercussion
Homogeneous bilateral uptake with symmetric differential function of 50%

other_tests.findings: Bilateral papillary colobomas, greater involvement in the left eye, divergent strabismus, and profound amblyopia in the left eye
other_tests.changes_over_time: No significant improvement in left amblyopia despite treatment
Varied over time, with 110/71 mmHg at 12 years

other_tests.findings: Weight, height, and BMI percentiles tracked over time
other_tests.changes_over_time: Progressive increase in weight and BMI, with obesity diagnosed at 10 years (BMI > 99th percentile)
